description: Explicit UI contract for the Sovereign portal /partners route.

header.title: Regional partners
header.subtitle: MOUs and shared resources with Indian Ocean partners.

non_negotiables: DataTable column order is fixed: Partner → Kind → Shared resources → MOU.
Diacritics in partner names (e.g. 'Madagascar Numérique') MUST be preserved.
MOU column accepts the literal string 'pending' as a sentinel for in-negotiation MOUs.
Pending MOUs MUST have resources === 0 (server-side invariant).
DataTable rows are non-interactive in v0.4 — do NOT bind onRowClick.
The page is purely a sovereign-side view; partner add / remove / MOU update happens admin-side.
